Module 3:
Quick Launch, Part 4
!
Executive Summary
• 	Example 3: “Wildcraft” Quick Launch by John Gallagher
• 	Very short and simple launch - entire process was less than 1,000 words
• 	Timing
• 	3 emails and a landing page
• 	Overall it’s incredibly quick and simple
• 	Offer
• 	Bonus/bundle on a board game that John has been selling for years
• 	Discount off the normal price
• 	Triggers
• 	Reciprocity
• 	Story
• 	Scarcity
• 	Event-based
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 1 of 4 --

• 	Community
• 	Likeability
• 	Anticipation
• 	Email 1
• 	Triggers: reciprocity, likeability, story
• 	Quick mention in normal newsletter
• 	In the P.S. - mentions Wildcraft product (board game) is almost back
on sale
• 	50% off product plus a bonus
• 	Email 2
• 	Triggers: story, scarcity, event-based, reason why, community (and a
CRUSHING offer)
• 	Starts with event-based angle, and product had been off the market
• 	Mentions nearly 50% off
• 	Mentions bonuses (previously sold webinar that they get for free)
• 	Ends with scarcity and close out date
• 	Tip: just talking about community creates the community
• 	Sends them to the secret page where they can make the purchase
!
2	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 2 of 4 --

• 	Delivers lots of scarcity but in a very understated way
• 	Sale is exclusive to newsletter subscribers
• 	Scarce information about scarcity is even more powerful
• 	Email 3
• 	Triggers: scarcity, likeability, conversation
• 	Subject line: Oops...forgot to say… (performed very well)
• 	“I got a bunch of emails…” - social proof
• 	Flips perspective - if you want the bonus and didn’t want the main
product, it’s the same thing
• 	Email 4
• 	Triggers: story, scarcity, reason why, event-based, community (and a
CRUSHING offer)
• 	Final email - starts with scarcity
• 	Digs into the reason why…
• 	Creates a “we’re all in it together” feel
• 	Reiterate offer
• 	Sends them to hidden page
• 	Ends with thanking the community
!
3	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 3 of 4 --

• 	In total this process of writing emails took about 1 hour
• 	Resulted in 800 sales and $16,000 in sales
• 	There’s 3 different style Quick Launches for you
• 	Each one very profitable and effective with a limited amount of work
!
Quick Launch Final Summary & Action Steps
There are three types of Quick Launches: Jeff’s Tax Sale, Go Romance,
and Wildcraft
Determine if a Quick Launch is right for you and your business (see
Quick Launch, Part 1)
Decide what type of Quick Launch you want to perform to get this extra
cash infusion
Plan your launch and design it around a story
Don’t overdo these and make sure you keep the integrity and positioning
of your brand strong
!
